getWhereClause(AttachmentDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<AttachmentDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.AttachmentDAOImpl
Builds dynamic where clause for search queries using Criteria API This method can be used to add filtering conditions based on DTO fields.
getWhereClause(CollegeDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<CollegeDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.CollegeDAOImpl
Builds dynamic where clause conditions based on CollegeDTO fields.
getWhereClause(CourseDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<CourseDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.CourseDAOImpl
Builds dynamic where clause conditions based on CourseDTO fields.
getWhereClause(DepartmentDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<DepartmentDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.DepartmentDAOImpl
 
getWhereClause(FacultyDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<FacultyDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.FacultlyDAOImpl
Builds dynamic where clause conditions based on the values provided in FacultyDTO.
getWhereClause(MarksheetDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<MarksheetDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.MarksheetDAOImpl
Builds dynamic where clause conditions based on the values provided in MarksheetDTO.
getWhereClause(NotificationDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<NotificationDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.NotificationDAOImpl
 
getWhereClause(RoleDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<RoleDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.RoleDAOImpl
Builds dynamic where clause conditions based on the values present in the RoleDTO object.
getWhereClause(StudentDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<StudentDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.StudentDAOImpl
Constructs the WHERE clause predicates for querying StudentDTO.
getWhereClause(SubjectDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<SubjectDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.SubjectDAOImpl
Builds a list of predicates for querying the database.
getWhereClause(TimeTableDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<TimeTableDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.TimeTableDAOImpl
Builds the WHERE clause predicates for querying TimeTableDTO.
getWhereClause(UserDTO, CriteriaBuilder, Root<UserDTO>) - Method in class com.rays.dao.UserDAOImpl
Builds the dynamic WHERE clause for UserDTO queries.
getWhereClause(T, CriteriaBuilder, Root<T>) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl
Constructs the WHERE clause for criteria queries.
